title: Applied Botanics
description: mana through ae2, what could go wrong
body:
## Applied Botanics

An addon for Botania support for AE2. Please report issues on [the issue tracker](https://github.com/ramidzkh/Applied-Botanics/issues/). Join the [AE2 discord server](https://discord.gg/Zd6t9ka7ne) for discussion.

## Mana P2P tunnels!

Mana P2P tunnels can be made by right clicking any Botania item on a P2P tunnel. Mana can then instantly travel through to any outputs, such as a Mana pool, Runic Altar, Terrasteel Agglomeration Plate or anything else!

<iframe width="638" height="358" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/XN_pH0x-rKk" title="Instant terrasteel" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Wired sparks!

A spark can also be placed on the input of a Mana P2P tunnel, allowing an insane amount of mana throughput with a dominant spark augment and multiple pools!

## Corporea index support!

A Corporea spark can be placed on a public system's ME interface, and then the Corporea Index will be able to extract items right out of your ME system!

<iframe width="638" height="358" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VUxV3kNdY_c" title="ME through Corporea" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
